reasoning: The market price for Google holding the #1 position at the end of 2025 was 0.63 as recently as August 21, 2025. Although OpenAI's GPT-5 launched in early August 2025 and took the top spot on the LMArena leaderboard, the market heavily favors Google to end the year at #1. This is well explained by release cycle dynamics: OpenAI just played its major 2025 card with GPT-5, while Google hasn't released Gemini 2.5 Ultra or Gemini 3.0 yet. Speculation and leaked references suggest a Gemini 3.0 or 2.5 Ultra launch in late 2025 (around October). This structural advantage of having the "last word" in the calendar year explains why Google is a ~63% favorite over competitors like OpenAI and Anthropic. Furthermore, in the event of a tie with OpenAI or xAI, the alphabetical tie-breaker favors "Google." In the absence of major AI news in the late days of August contradicting this trend, I will align with the market consensus of 0.63.
